title: BoundaryCalculusEvidenceEnvelope
description: AgentPlane evidence envelope emitted when agents use the Boundary Calculus claim discipline. AgentPlane emits evidence; SocioSphere owns the standard and promotion/demotion controller.

run_ref.description: AgentPlane run artifact reference that emitted this envelope

local_model.description: The model or agent producing the claim

boundary_or_interface.description: The boundary or interface at which the claim is being evaluated

load_bearing.description: Whether the claim is load-bearing in a downstream decision or security gate

non_claims.description: Explicit list of what this envelope does NOT assert

evidence_refs.description: References to supporting evidence for this claim

promotion_gate.description: Reference to the gate that must approve promotion to a stronger claim status

security_escalation_ref.description: Reference to security escalation record, required when policy_result=escalate

attribution_source.description: Source of attribution claim, if any

attribution_discriminating_evidence_refs.description: Evidence refs that discriminate this attribution from alternatives
